title: Bail (disambiguation)
content:
'''Bail''' could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Bail Antilles]]''', [[senator]] of [[Alderaan]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic]].
*'''[[Bail Prestor Organa]]''', senator of Alderaan in the [[Galactic Senate]] and Bail Antilles' successor.

==Legends==
*'''[[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]]''', [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] final years.
*'''[[Bail Antilles (Galactic Alliance)|Bail Antilles]]''', a member of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Triumvirate (Galactic Alliance)|Triumvirate]].
*'''[[Bail Falcris]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]].
*'''[[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Prestor Organa]]''', founder of the Rebel Alliance, whose name had [[Bail Organa (disambiguation)|many other uses]].
*'''''[[Bailed Out]]''''', a [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] comic.

{{Disambig}}
